purpose: Documents related to Ahmad Ali's integration course participation, attendance, and progress.

validationCriteria.description: Course documents must be from BAMF-accredited providers
Attendance records must show sufficient course hours

validationCriteria.successCriteria: DTZ B1 level and LiD test passed for full completion

processingGuidelines: This is a new application - no existing course documents expected yet
Once enrolled, track course provider confirmation
Monitor attendance records as course progresses
Verify test results upon course completion

commonMistakes.resolution: Ensure enrollment only with BAMF-accredited providers
